description_long: This skateboard features a classic, elongated deck with a slightly upturned nose and tail, finished in a uniform reddish-brown color. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, giving it a sturdy yet flexible structure suitable for tricks and urban riding. The skateboard is supported by two sets of small, dark wheels, likely made of polyurethane, attached to metal trucks that are only partially visible from the side. The top of the deck is plain, with no visible grip tape or graphic design, suggesting a minimalist or unfinished style. The overall shape is symmetrical, with rounded edges and a flat central section for stability. There are no visible brand logos, text, or decorative elements on any part of the skateboard.
description: A minimalist reddish-brown skateboard with a plain deck, rounded edges, and small dark wheels. The design is simple, with no visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the reddish-brown deck, upturned nose and tail, and two small dark wheels beneath.
description_view_1: End view displaying the width of the deck, rounded corners, and the flat surface with no visible grip tape or graphics.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the deck's length, upturned ends, and wheels.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, again showing the deck's width and plain surface.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, small, black, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, low-profile, gray, no visible branding or unique features
